proto.name: udp
proto.showname: User Datagram Protocol, Src Port: 48879, Dst Port: 57005

proto.name: mac-nr
proto.showname: MAC-NR DL-SCH (TCI State Ind PDCCH) (SP ZP CSI-RS Res Set Act/Deact) (LCID:4 2 bytes) (LCID:2 0 bytes)

field.name: mac-nr.dlsch.lcid
field.showname: ..11 0100 = LCID: TCI State Indication for UE-specific PDCCH (0x34)

field.name: mac-nr.subheader
field.showname: Subheader: (SP ZP CSI-RS Res Set Act/Deact)

field.name: mac-nr.dlsch.lcid
field.showname: ..11 0000 = LCID: SP ZP CSI-RS Resource Set Activation/Deactivation (0x30)

field.name: mac-nr.control.sp-zp-csi-rs-resource-set-act-deact.sp-zp-rs-resource-set-id
field.showname: .... 0000 = SP ZP CSI-RS resource set ID: 0

proto.name: udp

field.name: mac-nr.rar.grant
field.showname: .... .000 0000 1101 1100 0000 0000 1110 = Grant: 0x00dc00e, TPC command for Msg3 PUSCH: 8dB

proto.showname: User Datagram Protocol, Src Port: 48879, Dst Port: 57005
